titleStmt.title: SII 30.90: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 90. (A.R. No. 167 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District. Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple-on the west wall of the central shrine Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 11: 1023 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti of the ruler tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc., This inscription registers a gift of 113 sheep for providing milk offerings to the deity Veṇṇaikkūttar at Tirumukkūḍal by Nāgaṉ Sūriyaṉ, a native of Akkāramaṅgalam. The ūrār of Tirumukkūḍal and Kūḍalūr received the sheep and took the responsibility of supplying milk and butter to the deity of the temple. Tirumukkūḍal and Kūḍalūr mentioned as northern hamlets of Madurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. The latter was an independent village (taṇiyūr) of Kaḷattūr kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍa-sōḻamaṇḍalam. A liquid measure namely madhurāntaka-nāḻi is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum porccayappāvaiyum cīrttaṉiccel
viyun taṉperun teviyarā(k)ki Iṉpuṟu neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷiṭaituṟai nāṭu ntuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar va
ṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟk karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum poruṭalīḻa
ttaracar tamuṭiyu māṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cun=tara muṭiyum In=ti
raṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ mu
ṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval pal paḻan=tivum ceruviṟciṉavil Irupatto
rukālaracu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=timattīvaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ tiruttaku muṭi
yum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum pīṭi
yal Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetik kulapperu malaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mu
tirvaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa nāmaṇaiyk koṇaiyum veñcilai vīrappañcappa
ḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil vaṇkīrtti Ātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉ
tolkulattu In=tira(a)rataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu
niṟai kulataṉakkuvaiyu(m)n=takaṭṭarum ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭa viṣayamum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiya
ḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭappu(ra)ttiyum Iraṇ(ṭa)curaṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇai kirttita
kkaṇalāṭamum toṭukaṭal caṅkuvoṭṭa mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟa
liyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittala neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirtta
ceṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari panmarāṉa śrīrājen=tira
coḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūrk koṭṭattu
taṉiyūr śrīmadhurān=takac caturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākai nirkuṉṟattu nilaimai tirumukkūṭalu
m kūṭalūrum Ūrom puṇaikkaittiṭṭu tirumu(mu)k kūṭalil veṇṇaik kūttarkku pālamutu ce
yya Akkāramaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ nākaṉ sūryyaṉ vaitta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟum
veṇṇaiamutu ceyyavaitta Āṭu Irupattu muṉṟum Āka Āṭu nūṟṟorupattu muṉṟum kaikko
ṇṭu nicatappaṭi maturān=taka nāḻiyāl Ucciyam potu pāl patināḻiyum ciṟukālai veṇṇai Āḻā
kkum Āka Ipparicu can=tarātittavaṟ tirumuṟṟattukke koṭuvan=taṭṭuvatāka cilālekai ceytu kuṭutto
m tirumukkūṭalum kūṭalūrūrom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutiṉeṉ Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu ci
yapura nāṭṭu ciyapuramāṉa śrīparān=tantaka caturvvetimaṅkalattu kaṭikai madhyastaṉ veṅkaṭavaṉ poṉ
malaiyeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
